entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS475) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2296.01E. 2. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SED CLIN CHANGE AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2292.01S. 3. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2295.01E. 4. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SED CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2294.01E. 5. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS476) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. ADDITION OF 4 DOMESTIC INTERNET PROTOCOL SERVICE (IPS) PORTS AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2314.01P.
2. ADDITION A NBIP-VPNS PORT PRICE AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2320.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS479) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. ADDITION DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS BY SWC, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2290.01E.
2. ADDITION ONE (1) VEEAM WIRELINE SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2272.01E.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS480) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. ADDITION OF ONE (1) SHARP ELECTRONICS SED AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2332.01E.
2. ADDITION OF TWO (2) CISCO SEDS AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2338.01E.
3. ADDITION OF A DOMESTIC DEDICATED ETHERNET BY SWC PRICE AND CLIN AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2339.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS481) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE 50M, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2304.01E.
2. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS BY SWC, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2305.01E.
3. ADDITION OF NON-DOMESTIC POP TABLE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2306.01S.
4. ADDITION OF THIRTY-ONE (31) CISCO WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2307.01E.
5. ADDITION OF ONE (1) CISCO, ONE (1) FORTINET AND THREE (3) FIREEYE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2308.01E.
6. ADDITION OF FIVE (5) NUTANIX SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2309.01E.
7. ADDITION OF EIGHT (8) CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2354.01E.
8. ADDITION OF FIVE (5) HEWLETT PACKARD SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2349.02E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS483) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. ADDITION OF TWO (2) PLANTRONICS SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2356.01E
2. TO REDUCE A CLIN PRICE FOR AN IPS DOMESTIC PORT AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2355.01P.
3. ADDITION OF ONE INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2299.01E. 1. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE 50M, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2304.01E.
2. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS BY SWC, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2305.01E.
3. ADDITION OF NON-DOMESTIC POP TABLE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2306.01S.
4. ADDITION OF THIRTY-ONE (31) CISCO WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2307.01E.
5. ADDITION OF ONE (1) CISCO, ONE (1) FORTINET AND THREE (3) FIREEYE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2308.01E.
6. ADDITION OF FIVE (5) NUTANIX SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2309.01E.
7. ADDITION OF EIGHT (8) CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2354.01E.
8. ADDITION OF FIVE (5) HEWLETT PACKARD SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2349.02E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS484) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. TO ADD SWC PRICING FOR DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2313.01E.
2. TO ADD DOMESTIC DEDICATED ETHERNET BY SWC, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2310.01E
3. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS BY SWC, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2312.01E.
4. TO ADD DOMESTIC DEDICATED ETHERNET ACCESS BY SWC, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2311.01E.
5. TO ADD FIVE (5) NETAPP SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2357.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS485) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2358.01E. 2. TO ADD SEVEN (7) NETAPP SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2359.01E 3. TO ADD ONE (1) CISCO SED, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2360.01E 4. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2363.01E. 5. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 6. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
